titles.en: Chapter on Forgetfulness in sa'i Between Safa and Marwah
Chapter on Forgetfulness in sa'i Between Safa and Marwah

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ أَنْ يَطُوفُ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ «يُطَافُ عَنْهُ ».
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ نَسِيَ أَنْ يَطُوفُ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ قَالَ «يُطَافُ عَنْهُ ».

segments:
Hadith.2848 - Al-‘Ala’ narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from one of the Imams (as):
"I asked him about a man who forgot to perform the Sa’i (the walking) between Safa and Marwah. Imam (as) said: 'It can be performed on his behalf.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2848 - Al-‘Ala’ narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from one of the Imams (as):
"I asked him about a man who forgot to perform the Sa’i (the walking) between Safa and Marwah. Imam (as) said: 'It can be performed on his behalf.'"

narratorChain.raw: 2848 - رَوَى اَلْعَلاَءُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Forgetfulness in sa'i Between Safa and Marwah

segments: «عَلَيْهِ بَقَرَةٌ يَذْبَحُهَا وَ يَطُوفُ شَوْطاً آخَرَ ».
arabic.text: «عَلَيْهِ بَقَرَةٌ يَذْبَحُهَا وَ يَطُوفُ شَوْطاً آخَرَ ».

segments:
Hadith.2849 - Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about a man who performed six circuits (Ashwat) between Safa and Marwah, thinking they were seven, and later, after having become lawful (Halal) and engaging in relations with women, realized that he had only completed six.
Imam (as) said: "He must sacrifice a cow and complete one more circuit (Shawt)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2849 - Abu Abdullah (as) was asked about a man who performed six circuits (Ashwat) between Safa and Marwah, thinking they were seven, and later, after having become lawful (Halal) and engaging in relations with women, realized that he had only completed six.
Imam (as) said: "He must sacrifice a cow and complete one more circuit (Shawt)."

narratorChain.raw: 2849 - وَ سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنْ رَجُلٍ طَافَ بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ سِتَّةَ أَشْوَاطٍ وَ هُوَ يَظُنُّ أَنَّهَا سَبْعَةٌ فَذَكَرَ بَعْدَ مَا أَحَلَّ وَ وَاقَعَ اَلنِّسَاءَ أَنَّهُ إِنَّمَا طَافَ سِتَّةً قَالَ

parts.text: سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ :
هُوَ يَظُنُّ أَنَّهَا سَبْعَةٌ فَذَكَرَ بَعْدَ مَا أَحَلَّ
وَاقَعَ اَلنِّسَاءَ أَنَّهُ إِنَّمَا طَافَ سِتَّةً

titles.en: Chapter on Forgetfulness in sa'i Between Safa and Marwah

segments:
رَجُلٍ سَعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ ثَمَانِيَةَ أَشْوَاطٍ فَقَالَ «إِنْ كَانَ خَطَأً طَرَحَ وَاحِداً وَ اِعْتَدَّ بِسَبْعَةٍ ».
وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «يُضِيفُ إِلَيْهَا سِتَّةً ».
arabic.text:
رَجُلٍ سَعَى بَيْنَ اَلصَّفَا وَ اَلْمَرْوَةِ ثَمَانِيَةَ أَشْوَاطٍ فَقَالَ «إِنْ كَانَ خَطَأً طَرَحَ وَاحِداً وَ اِعْتَدَّ بِسَبْعَةٍ ».
وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «يُضِيفُ إِلَيْهَا سِتَّةً ».

segments:
Hadith.2850 - Abdur Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj narrated from Abu Ibrahim (as) about a man who performed eight circuits (Sa'i) between Safa and Marwah.
Imam (as) said: "If it was an error, he should disregard one circuit and count seven as complete."
In another narration from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from one of the Imams (as), it is reported:
"He should add six more circuits to complete it properly."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2850 - Abdur Rahman ibn al-Hajjaj narrated from Abu Ibrahim (as) about a man who performed eight circuits (Sa'i) between Safa and Marwah.
Imam (as) said: "If it was an error, he should disregard one circuit and count seven as complete."
In another narration from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from one of the Imams (as), it is reported:
"He should add six more circuits to complete it properly."

narratorChain.raw: 2850 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ اَلْحَجَّاجِ عَنْ أَبِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي
